title: Parnak #6535
definition:
Parnach = "delicate"

 1) father of Elizaphan, prince of the tribe of Zebulun chosen to help
    apportion the promised land between the tribes
nasbUsage:

 1) father of Elizaphan, prince of the tribe of Zebulun chosen to help
    apportion the promised land between the tribes
